positive: Minimalist geometric landscape featuring stylized mountain peaks and stylized sunburst elements. The design should be composed of solid, interlocking shapes in a limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and cream. Strong silhouettes, high contrast, and clean vector aesthetic. Central composition suitable for t-shirt printing. Clean lines, flat graphic design, 2D art, isometric view, rule of thirds composition.
